subject: Re:
body:
First you take the time to ask my opinion, then you  totally  ignore, it, then you ask the same question again... you are becoming an arab


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 22, 2007 2:44:25 AM
Subject: 


Jeffrey,
I know how you don't like me swearing, but fuck, I just found out who's son I would be working for at Strategic Communication Group, Adnan Khashoggi's son, Mohamed Khashoggi. CEO is Mustapha El Alaoui. 
 
Do you still think I should stay away and go w/ the Islamic Financial Company?

Always,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
